name: inspect_repository
description: Read repository structure and file contents from GitHub.

path.description: Optional file or directory path. Omit to list the repository tree.

ref.description: Optional git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA).

path_filter.description: Optional prefix filter when listing the tree (e.g. docs/).

recursive.description: When listing the tree, include nested paths (default true).

name: update_documentation
description: Create or update documentation files (README* and docs/** only).

base_ref.description: Base branch when creating a new branch.

issue_number.description: Optional issue number for branch naming.

name: modify_source_code
description: Create or update non-documentation source files (for Cedar deny demo).

path.description: Source file path (not README* or docs/**).

base_ref.description: Base branch when creating a new branch.

issue_number.description: Optional issue number for branch naming.
